issues.description: DrawCard condition should check "TrashCount" (Life cards in trash = 0), not "Always". The effect reads "if you have 0 Life cards" which means the condition must verify TrashCount equals 0.

Second effect (FlipLife with Trigger) is extraneous and incorrect. The original card text contains only one effect: the Counter with conditional draw. There is no separate FlipLife action described in the card text.
